title: Charles IV of France becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Charles IV, called the Fair in France and the Bald in Navarre, was the last king of the direct line of the House of Capet, King of France and King of Navarre from 1322 to 1328.

title: Louis X of France becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Louis X, known as the Quarrelsome, was King of France from 1314 and King of Navarre from 1305 until his death.

title: John I of France becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: John I, called the Posthumous, was the King of France and Navarre, as the posthumous son and successor of Louis X, for the four days he lived in 1316.

title: Philip V of France becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Philip V, known as the Tall, was King of France and Navarre from 1316 to 1322.

title: Charles II of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Charles II, known as the Bad, was King of Navarre beginning in 1349, as well as Count of Évreux beginning in 1343, holding both titles until his death in 1387.

title: Joan I of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Joan I was ruling Queen of Navarre and Countess of Champagne from 1274 until 1305.

title: Joan II of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Joan II was Queen of Navarre from 1328 until her death in 1349.

title: John II of Aragon becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: John II, called the Great or the Faithless, was King of Aragon from 1458 until his death in 1479.

title: Blanche I of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Blanche I was Queen of Navarre from the death of her father, King Charles III, in 1425 until her own death.

title: Sancho VII of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Sancho VII, called the Strong, was King of Navarre from 1194 until his death in 1234.

title: Leonor I of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Eleanor of Navarre was a Navarrese princess and monarch.

title: Theobald I of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Theobald I, also called the Troubadour and the Posthumous, was Count of Champagne from birth and King of Navarre from 1234.

title: Catherine of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Catherine was Queen of Navarre from 1483 until 1517.

title: Sancho VI of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Sancho Garcés VI, called the Wise was King of Navarre from 1150 until his death in 1194.

title: Charles III of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Charles III, called the Noble, was King of Navarre from 1387 to his death and Count of Évreux in France from 1387 to 1404, when he exchanged Évreux for the Duchy of Nemours.

title: Henry I of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Henry the Fat was King of Navarre and Count of Champagne and Brie from 1270 until his death.

title: Blanche II of Navarre becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Blanche II was a Navarrese princess and claimant to the throne of Navarre.

title: Charles, Prince of Viana becomes sovereign of Navarre
fact: Charles, Prince of Viana, sometimes called Charles IV of Navarre, was the eldest son of King John II of Aragon and Queen Blanche I of Navarre.
